manifesto.title: Analytics as a tool, not entertainment

sober.title: Sober mind
sober.text: A systemic view over emotions. Logic, facts, macroeconomic cycles. No clichés or empty phrases.

architecture.title: Architecture of meaning
architecture.text: Technology, politics, economy are not separate topics but a single map. Connections matter more than events.

sovereignty.title: Sovereignty
sovereignty.text: Freedom for business and technology. Money is a tool of influence, not an end in itself. Russia is a country of opportunity for clear minds.

projects.title: Our projects
projects.subtitle: IT solutions we build with our hands. Each one is live, not a pitch deck.
